text:
Chronic Conditions Warehouse Virtual Research Data Center 
TAF Demographic and Eligibility RIFs Codebook │ December 2025 │ V 1.8 36 

DEATH_IND 

LABEL: Indicator that Beneficiary Died During the Calendar Year 

DESCRIPTION: A flag to indicate whether the beneficiary was deceased in the calendar year of the data file, or in a 
prior year. 

SHORT NAME: DEATH_IND 

LONG NAME: DEATH_IND 

TYPE: NUM 

LENGTH: 1 

FILE(S): Annual DE base 

SOURCE: T-MSIS annual demographic and eligibility TAF
